accurate.why: Accurately describes funding allocation, policy riders, and restrictions; correctly identifies major conditions and prohibitions.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all cited provisions are in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as FY2025 DHS appropriations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes specific policy prohibitions and conditions that change how funds may be used.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes ICE detention bed minimum, GPS monitoring requirement, and other key conditions.

effective_dates.why: Does not specify the contraceptive provision effective dates but also does not misstate them; criterion is marginally applicable.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers major funding components, policy restrictions, reporting requirements, and rescissions.

concise.why: Good balance of detail without excessive length.

correct_entities.why: DHS components, CBP One app, and specific programs correctly named.

correct_figures.why: $600 million CBP barrier rescission and $154 million Nonrecurring Expenses Fund rescission correctly stated.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
